title: Variables in always blocks get wrong lifetime (static instead of automatic)
body:
Ran into this while debugging other things.  It appears that there was a commit 7607f0e7f (Feb 24, 2026) that changed variable initializer handling.   I think visit(AstNodeProcedure*) in V3LinkParse.cpp never set m_lifetime to automatic for always blocks, so all procedure-local variables got STATIC_IMPLICIT and their initializers were evaluated once.

So statements like:
`EntryType Entry = queue[idx];`

Inside an always_comb no longer work correctly.

I created a simple testcase and a quick fix.  Not sure if its the right fix however, but will open a pull.
